{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block title %}Prescription Details - Pharmacy Management System{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Prescription Details

Print Prescription
Patient: {{ prescription.patient_name }}
Prescription ID: #{{ prescription.id }}
{% if prescription.filled %} FILLED {% else %} PENDING {% endif %}
Medication
{{ prescription.medicine.name }}

{{ prescription.medicine.brand }} ({{ prescription.medicine.category }})

Prescribed Qty
{{ prescription.quantity }} Units
Available Stock
{{ prescription.medicine.stock_quantity }} Units
Prescribed By

{{ prescription.prescriber|default:"Not Specified" }}

Order Cost Estimate

₦{{ prescription.total_price|floatformat:2 }}

Dosage Instructions
{{ prescription.dosage }}
Registered: {{ prescription.date_prescribed|date:"M d, Y (h:i A)" }}
{% if prescription.filled %}
Filled by: {{ prescription.filled_by.username }}
{{ prescription.filled_date|date:"M d, Y (h:i A)" }}
{% endif %}
{% if not prescription.filled and user.is_admin or not prescription.filled and user.is_pharmacist or not prescription.filled and user.is_assistant %}
{% if prescription.medicine.stock_quantity < prescription.quantity %}
Insufficient stock available to fill this prescription.
Add Stock {% else %}
Grand Total: ₦{{ prescription.total_price|floatformat:2 }}
{% csrf_token %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
